t_ch: 虽说贝斯确实在乐队里很不起眼，但我还是想表现得更好点。
t_en: The bass may not be the highlight in a band, but I still want to play it better.

t_ch: 别担心，我也不会。
t_en: Don't worry. I don't know how to play, either.

t_ch: 谢谢安慰。但您是乐队经理，根本不需要登台表演啊。
t_en: Thank you for comforting me. You're the band manager though, you don't have to get on stage.

t_ch: 来到排练室前，我从来没有和朋友合奏过，也没上过台，都是靠梦泡里的内容在自学。
t_en: Before coming to the rehearsal room, I've never even played with friends before, nor have I performed on stage. I taught myself to play from dream bubbles.

t_ch: 或许…我最开始就不该参加乐队。
t_en: Maybe... I shouldn't even have joined the band to begin with.

t_ch: 来都来了！
t_en: I mean, you're already here, though!

t_ch: 还是别给自己太大压力。
t_en: Don't stress yourself out too much.

t_ch: 嗯。谢谢。
t_en: Mm, thank you.

t_ch: 或许…我最开始就不该参加乐队。
t_en: Maybe... I shouldn't even have joined the band to begin with.

t_ch: 喂喂，经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}。我有个问题想问，就是…你和乱破小姐很熟吗？
t_en: Hey, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, I have a question. Umm... are you and Rappa really close?

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我想拉近和她的关系，但始终找不到什么好办法，你能帮忙支支招嘛？
t_en: To be honest, I'm trying to get to know her better, but I haven't found a good way. Can you help me out?

t_ch: 譬如…乱破小姐的背景信息，她是哪里人，平时喜欢做些什么。知道了这些情报，我才能因材施教、对症下药、百折不挠。如此甚好。
t_en: Like... Ms. Rappa's background, where she's from, what she usually likes to do. With this info, I can learn more about her, use the right moves, and eliminate all obstacles. That'd be great.

t_ch: 你为什么会对乱破感兴趣？
t_en: Why're you interested in Rappa?

t_ch: 因为她实在太有魅力了！我在匹诺康尼长大，从小就在形形色色的派对中游荡，见过无数梦境名流与巨星，但从来没有任何人像乱破小姐这般特别——
t_en: Because she's super charming! I grew up on Penacony, and have been hopping from one party to another since young. I've met countless dreamscape celebrities and stars, but never one as special as Ms. Rappa...

t_ch: 华丽的外观，新颖的谈吐，难以捉摸的思维方式，还有那不知底气何来的自信。
t_en: Her gorgeous looks, her refreshing speech, that unpredictable way of thinking, and that inexplicably confident swagger.

t_ch: 啊，我的心已被乱破小姐夺走，此生或许不再有悲喜。
t_en: Ah, my heart has already been kidnapped by Ms. Rappa. My life may never know tragedy nor joy ever again.

t_ch: …别舔了。
t_en: ...You can stop sucking up to her.

t_ch: 不不，你误会了，我不是那种庸俗的人，我对乱破小姐的欣赏是一种对美好事物的向往！
t_en: No no, you're mistaken. I'm not a sleazeball, and my admiration for Ms. Rappa is a kind of pining for something beautiful!

t_ch: 别急，且听我细细道来啊！
t_en: Please don't be angry, and hear me out!

t_ch: 告诉我吧——所以，乱破小姐是哪里人？
t_en: So tell me, where's Ms. Rappa from?

t_ch: …江户星。
t_en: ...Edo Star.

t_ch: 没听说过的地方，但从名字来看应该很有意思！
t_en: Never heard of that place, but it sounds interesting!

t_ch: …匹诺康尼。
t_en: ...Penacony.

t_ch: 咦，不应该呀，我以前从来没见过乱破小姐，难道这就是所谓的忍•隐身术？
t_en: Huh? That can't be right. I've never met Ms. Rappa before. Could it be because of those so-called ninja stealth skills?

t_ch: …忍之都。
t_en: ...The Ninja Capital.

t_ch: 我在《银河忍法帖》里看到过这个地名，那是乱破小姐的家乡吧！想去！
t_en: I've seen this place name in Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions. That must be Miss Rappa's hometown! I want to go visit!

t_ch: …星穹列车。
t_en: ...The Astral Express.

t_ch: 喂，这是经理的故乡吧，莫非你是想说，自己和乱破小姐来自同个地方？
t_en: Hey, that's where you're from too. Are you telling me you and Ms. Rappa come from the same place?

t_ch: ——乱破小姐日常最喜欢做的事是什么呢？
t_en: ...What does Ms. Rappa like to do every day?

t_ch: …说唱。
t_en: ...Rap.

t_ch: 我也喜欢！看来我和乱破小姐有很多共同语言啊！
t_en: I like rap too! Looks like we share a common language!

t_ch: …涂鸦。
t_en: ...Graffiti.

t_ch: 我也喜欢！看来我和乱破小姐有很多共同语言啊！
t_en: I like rap too! Looks like we share a common language!

t_ch: …修行忍法。
t_en: ...Training in ninjutsu.

t_ch: 我也喜欢！看来我和乱破小姐有很多共同语言啊！
t_en: I like rap too! Looks like we share a common language!

t_ch: …翻垃圾桶。
t_en: ...Rummaging through trashcans.

t_ch: …？这是什么奇怪的爱好？虽然…但这个实在有点喜欢不动了。
t_en: ...? What kind of weird hobby is this? Although... but it's a little hard to like that.

t_ch: ——乱破小姐最讨厌的东西是？
t_en: ...What does Ms. Rappa dislike most?

t_ch: …猴子。
t_en: ...Monkeys.

t_ch: 我知道我知道，是说「睡蕉小猴」吧？那都过气好久了，讨厌也正常。
t_en: I know, I know. You're talking about the Slumbernana Monkey, right? That's super outdated, and it's normal to hate it.

t_ch: …浣熊。
t_en: ...Raccoons.

t_ch: 虽然喜欢翻垃圾桶，但这种小动物还挺有意思…的吧？
t_en: Although it likes to rummage through trashcans, this animal is still quite interesting... right?

t_ch: …邪恶敌人。
t_en: ...Evil enemies.

t_ch: 铲除邪恶，行侠仗义，银河忍法！我就知道，乱破小姐果然是真正的忍者！
t_en: Eradicating evil, and upholding justice, and enacting the ways of the cosmic ninja! I knew it, Ms. Rappa is indeed a true ninja!

t_ch: …空垃圾桶。
t_en: ...Empty trashcans.

t_ch: …？不明白你到底想说什么。
t_en: ...? I don't understand what you're trying to say.

t_ch: 感谢！你就是我最好的{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！我有想法了，等我的好消息吧！
t_en: Thank you! You're my best {F#buddy}{M#buddy}! I have an idea. Just wait for my good news!

t_ch: 等演出结束后再说吧。
t_en: Let's talk about it after the performance

t_ch: 行，这是乱破小姐的乐队，我当然不能让她失望。不过你要是有什么想说的，记得随时来找我啊。
t_en: Sure, this is Ms. Rappa's band. I'll not disappoint her. If you have anything you want to say, feel free to look for me!

t_ch: 这是乱破小姐的乐队，我不能让她失望！
t_en: This is Miss Rappa's band. I'll not disappoint her.

t_ch: 呼——久等了，新的音律•忍法已经创作完成，是在下的得意之作，绝不会出差错。
t_en: Phew, thank you for waiting. The new Sound Release ninjutsu composition is complete. It's my proud creation, and there will be no mistakes.

t_ch: 主公，我等该何时出战，就交由你决定吧。
t_en: Sound Master, I shall leave it to you to decide when I shall take to the field of battle.

t_ch: 到我们出场的时候了！
t_en: It is time for us to make our entrance!

t_ch: 再等等吧…
t_en: Wait a moment...

t_ch: ——前路漫漫，凶险异常。焦急的观众翘首以盼，静候音律忍法来将舞台点燃！
t_en: The patch before us is long and fraught with danger. The anxious audience awaits with bated breath, ready for the Sound Release ninjutsu to set the stage ablaze!

t_ch: 「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的诸位，请随在下赶赴音律•猎场——
t_en: Everyone in {TEXTJOIN#120}, please follow me to the Sound Hunting Ground...

t_ch: 现在担心也没有意义。走吧，别犹豫了。
t_en: Well, there's no point in worrying now. Let's go. No time to hesitate.

t_ch: 我…会尽我所能的。但请您别抱太高期待。
t_en: I... will do what I can. But don't get your hopes up.

t_ch: 喔，该前往属于我们的战场了！
t_en: Alright. Time to head onto a battlefield all our own!

t_ch: 主公，在下已做好准备，何时该出战，就交由你决定吧。
t_en: Sound Master, I am prepared and at the ready. I shall leave it to you to decide when it is time for battle.

t_ch: 到我们出场的时候了！
t_en: It is time for us to make our entrance!

t_ch: 再等等吧…
t_en: Wait a moment...

t_ch: ——前路漫漫，凶险异常。焦急的观众翘首以盼，静候音律忍法来将舞台点燃！
t_en: The patch before us is long and fraught with danger. The anxious audience awaits with bated breath, ready for the Sound Release ninjutsu to set the stage ablaze!

t_ch: 「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的诸位，请随在下赶赴音律•猎场——
t_en: Everyone in {TEXTJOIN#120}, please follow me to the Sound Hunting Ground...

t_ch: 好、好多人啊……
t_en: S—So many people...

t_ch: 不过是场校园派对的演出而已，比这大得多的场面我都见过，完全不算…算什么的。
t_en: It's just a school party performance. I've seen plenty of crowds bigger than this. Th—This is nothing.

t_ch: 就要登台了，记得各自检查乐器的状况。还觉得紧张，可以把眼睛闭起来，将动作完全交给音乐。弹错了也没关系，跟我的节奏就好。
t_en: We're about to go on. Remember to double-check your instruments. If you're still nervous, just close your eyes and let the music move for you. It's fine even if you play the notes wrong. Just follow my lead.

t_ch: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，上台前也和大家说几句吧。
t_en: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Manager, you should say something to everyone before they go on.

t_ch: （说点正经的）
t_en: (Say something proper)

t_ch: 呃…把每场都当最后一场来演奏，然后就也不要怕失误。加油啊，各位！
t_en: Err... treat every stage as if it's your last performance, and never fear mistakes. Let's give 'em a good show, everyone!
...Yeah!

t_ch: （说点搞笑的）
t_en: (Say something funny)

t_ch: 别怕啊！你们的乐队经理正在热身，真出了什么问题，我来顶上！
t_en: Don't worry! Your band manager is just getting warmed up. I'll take the heat if something really goes wrong!

t_ch: 噢…噢！
t_en: Ohh... Ohhhhh!

t_ch: 唔。气氛炒得差不多，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」——准备登台了！
t_en: Mm, the crowd has been warmed up enough. {TEXTJOIN#120}, prepare to take the stage!

t_ch: 等等…你负责的乐器呢?
t_en: Hold on... where's your instrument?

t_ch: 在下的忍具，便是——
t_en: My ningu, it is...

t_ch: 咳。
t_en: Ahem.

t_ch: 诸位——我等乃是「{TEXTJOIN#120}」！如刃尖般划破旧时代帷幕的音律•忍者流派是也！
t_en: Everyone! We are {TEXTJOIN#120}! The Sound Ninja school that will slash open the decrepit curtains of old like a sharp blade!

t_ch: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

t_ch: 初次登台，闲话少说。请期待在下及诸音忍带来的，超•精彩绝伦的演出吧！
t_en: It is our first time on stage, so I'll keep it short. Please look forward to the super-excitingly fabulous show that the sound ninja and I are about to bring you!

t_ch: ——音律•狩猎，开始！
t_en: ...Let the Sound Hunt begin!

t_ch: ——开始！
t_en: ...Let's go!

t_ch: 感谢诸位！能收到如此多的赞美之词，在下非常开心！
t_en: Thank you everyone! I am jubilant to have received such thunderous praise!

t_ch: …为何我等打扮成这般模样？角色扮演？非也！此乃在下精心设计的音忍•盛装是也！
t_en: ...Why am I dressed like that? Roleplaying? Nay! This is my painstakingly designed Sound Ninja Fashion Garb!

t_ch: （看观众的反应，乐队演出很成功的样子。去问问现场的评价吧。）
t_en: (The band's performance is a resounding success from the audience's reactions. Let's go ask what they think.)

t_ch: 高端乐队就是不一样！这个「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出确实啊，旋律正劲头足，听起来真爽！
t_en: Now that's the caliber of a great band! This performance by {TEXTJOIN#120} is truly head-banging! It was a delight to listen to!

t_ch: 演出的水准确实很高，即使像我这样专业的乐评人也挑不出什么毛病。
t_en: The show's caliber was outstanding. Even a seasoned music critic like me had nothing to nitpick.

t_ch: 真要说的话…那个打碟的姑娘也太有活力了……
t_en: If I had to pick holes in it, though... That DJ lady had too much energy...

t_ch: 你知道的，我从很早时候就开始看「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的演出了，一直是乐队的粉丝。
t_en: You already know I've been watching {TEXTJOIN#120}'s performances since they started. I've always been a fan of the band.

t_ch: 至于谐乐学院，我祝那群老顽固安好。这才是真正的音乐啊！
t_en: As for Charmony Academy, I wish that bunch of stubborn old coots well. THIS is what real music is!

t_ch: （观众对乐队演出的评价都很高，看来可以放心了。）
t_en: (The band's reviews from the audience are very positive. Looks like I had nothing to worry about.)

t_ch: 你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段愉快的时光。
t_en: You bask in the venue's uproarious buzz, enjoying a pleasant time.

t_ch: 嗯…这么动听的配乐，如果用在我的影片里……
t_en: Hmm... Such an emotional underscore. If I used it in my film...

t_ch: 芮克先生？
t_en: Mr. Reca?

t_ch: 太好了，你还认得我，说明我给片场「善后」的时候没有拿错记忆。
t_en: Excellent. You still remember me. That means I didn't retrieve the wrong memory when I "redressed" the set.

t_ch: 你还没走？
t_en: You haven't left?

t_ch: 是啊，片场的「善后」花了我不少时间。
t_en: Yes, the set's "redressing" took me some time.

t_ch: 记得付版权费。
t_en: Remember to foot the license fee.

t_ch: 哈哈，我不会忘的——但你们会不会忘，就不好说了。
t_en: Haha, I won't forget. But whether you remember is another story.

t_ch: 多亏了你们先前带来的演出，才能有令观众们满意的新作。
t_en: It's all thanks to the show you guys played that made the new piece such a favorite.

t_ch: 但没想到你们又准备了一场这么精彩的音乐片，早知道就晚些完成剪辑了。
t_en: But I never thought you would prepare yet another superb music set. I would've delayed the post-production if I knew.

t_ch: 不管怎么说，我的成片拍摄已经结束了，后面的花絮就全部留给你们的音乐吧。
t_en: Regardless, my film shooting has already wrapped. I'll leave the highlights at the back to your music.

t_ch: 哟！「音律•主公」！
t_en: Yo! Sound Master!

t_ch: 哟，缭乱•忍侠！
t_en: Yo, Dazzling Ninja Hero!

t_ch: 这里还有危险？
t_en: Is there still danger here?

t_ch: 原来你还在上学啊？
t_en: So you're actually still attending school?

t_ch: 我等已摧毁邪祟们的诡计，「毗乃昆尼」的长夜也迎来破晓。在下滞留此地，只是为了收集关于御猿•邪忍的罪证。
t_en: I have shattered the fiendlings' conspiracy, and Pinecany's long night also welcomes daybreak. The reason I have remained here is merely to collect criminal evidence related to the Evil Ninja Osaru.

t_ch: 实不相瞒，在下本应于近日启程——但得知忍徒们的祭典陷入窘困之境，忍侠绝不能袖手旁观。
t_en: Truth be told, I was to depart soon, but when I learned that the ninja initiates' festival was in jeopardy, this Ninja Hero could not sit idly by.

t_ch: 唉，既然是知更鸟小姐推荐的人选，又是芮克先生看中的明星，那应该不会出什么问题。
t_en: *sigh* Since it's someone recommended by Miss Robin, and a superstar picked by Mr. Reca, that shouldn't be a problem.

t_ch: 股东，音乐派对是折纸大学最重要的庆典，你们可得上点心啊！
t_en: Dear shareholder, the music party is Paperfold University's most important celebration. You all must put in double the effort!

t_ch: 「晖长石号」的新主人，匹诺康尼的股东，总不可能连个音乐派对都搞砸吧？
t_en: As the new owner of the Radiant Feldspar, and a shareholder of Penacony, I'm sure you won't mess up a mere music party, will you?

t_ch: 后续的筹办工作就交给你们了，别让全银河的观众看笑话就好。
t_en: We'll leave the upcoming organizational work to you. Just don't become the laughingstock of the entire Cosmos.

t_ch: 听闻这位外校人士在表演方面颇有造诣，如此不失为种好的解题思路。
t_en: I hear that this outsider has considerable performing talent, and it may yet be a good approach to solving the problem.

t_ch: 期待：预祝你们在音乐派对的演出能顺利进行。
t_en: Anticipation: I wish your music party performance smooth-sailing.

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！音乐派对还在进行中，校园里好玩的东西可多啦。特意到舞台旁边来，是有什么事吗？
t_en: Festive Superstar! The music party is still ongoing, and there are still many things to do around the campus. Is there something you need since you specifically came by the stage?

t_ch: 准备乐队演出。
t_en: Prepare for the band performance.

t_ch: 辛苦了！我来帮你看看现在的进度。
t_en: Thank you for the hard work! I'm just here to help you take a look at the progress.

t_ch: 可以和你聊聊吗？
t_en: Can we have a chat?

t_ch: 好呀。布置舞台也挺无聊的，不如来说说话，盛会巨星同学想要知道些什么呢？
t_en: Sure. Decorating the stage is kinda boring, but then again, as the Festive Superstar, is there anything you would like to know?

t_ch: 关于乐队的评价…
t_en: The band's reviews...

t_ch: 毫无疑问，大家都很喜欢「缭乱」的音乐！不仅新潮有趣，还很酷！我熟悉的朋友现在都是你们的粉丝，争着想要乱破大人的签名呢。
t_en: Without a doubt, everyone loves the music of the Dazzling! It's not just trendy and making waves, it's also really cool! All my friends are your fans now, and everyone is fighting for Rappa's autograph.

t_ch: 虽然…学校那边是有些反对的声音，但不用管他们。那群老师就是什么都看不惯，和他们想法不一样的就要批评。哎呀，谁叫这里是学校呢。
t_en: Although... there are some voices of objection from the school, but don't mind it. That bunch of teachers just cannot tolerate anything that's different, and they criticize anything that doesn't align with their views. Oh well, that's why it's a school.

t_ch: 我的签名可以吗？
t_en: How about my autograph?

t_ch: 真要给啊？！你可是盛会巨星诶，签名很值钱的，还是别轻易送吧。
t_en: You're really going to give me your autograph!? You're the Festive Superstar, and your autograph is very valuable. Don't give it away so easily.

t_ch: …乱破大人倒是给过我她画的忍符，不过那是我的珍藏。嘿嘿。
t_en: ...Though Lady Rappa gave me a ninja talisman she drew — that's my precious baby. Heh-heh.

t_ch: 具体讨厌什么地方呢？
t_en: What exactly do they dislike?

t_ch: 什么着装不合规范啦，旋律不符合主流风格啦，开场白太长啦…只要想挑刺，总是能找到毛病的，别放在心上。
t_en: Stuff like not adhering to dress code, melodies that don't fit into mainstream music, opening speech being too long... As long as they want to nitpick, they will find that needle in the haystack, so don't take it to heart.

t_ch: 音乐派对是学生们的活动，至于那群老师，就让他们生闷气好啦！
t_en: The music party is an event for the students. Just let those teachers be upset all they want!

t_ch: 大概明白了。
t_en: I've just about got everything.

t_ch: 关于音乐派对…
t_en: About the music party...

t_ch: 音乐派对是彩梦校庆最盛大的活动，也是学生们最期待的时候！
t_en: The music party is the grandest event of the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration. It's also a time that all students look forward to!

t_ch: 大家都忙着筹办庆典，校园里到处都是好玩的摊位和活动，光是闲逛都觉得眼花缭乱了。自由、欢快，这才是大学该有的氛围呀。
t_en: Everyone is busy preparing for the celebration, and the campus is filled with fun booths and activities. Just wandering around is enough to make you feel overwhelmed. Freedom and joy — this is what the atmosphere of a college should feel like.

t_ch: 更不用说…还有这么精彩的乐队演出！
t_en: Needless to say... there's also such an exciting performance!

t_ch: 音乐派对会持续多久？
t_en: How long will the music party last?

t_ch: 按以往的经验来看，音乐派对会和彩梦校庆同步结束。但要求延长举办时间的呼声也一直存在，所以这次究竟要办多久，谁都说不准。
t_en: According to past experience, the music party and the Dreamlight Anniversary celebration will end at the same time. But there are people who are constantly asking for the event time to be extended. No one really knows for sure how long this will last.

t_ch: 哎呀，对我们来说，当然是希望办得越久越好啦。
t_en: As for us, of course, we'd like it to last as long as possible.

t_ch: 音乐派对和三个学院的关系？
t_en: The music party is related to the three academies?

t_ch: 虽说音乐派对是由学生组织的活动，但还是会受到各个学院的影响。
t_en: Although the music party is a student initiative, it's still influenced by the various schools.

t_ch: 譬如…以前的乐队核心往往都由谐乐学院指定，财富学院则会对演出的规模和时长提出要求，筑梦学院倒是很简单啦，成员的绩点足够就好。
t_en: For example... back then, the band leader was often appointed by Charmony Academy, while Fortune Academy would set requirements for the scale and duration of the performance. As for Dreamweaver Academy, it was straightforward — members just needed to have a sufficient grade.

t_ch: 像这次，由学院外的同学…就是盛会巨星和乱破大人来主导乐队的情况还是头一回，所以才格外地有意思！
t_en: But this time, having students from outside the academies... having Rappa and the Festive Superstar directing the band is the first of its kind, so it's kinda special!

t_ch: 音乐派对很重要吗？
t_en: Is the music party very important?

t_ch: 学院代表会说什么…「音乐派对是对外展示折纸大学活力与创造性的窗口」，但学生们才不在乎这个，只要活动办得有意思就好。
t_en: What did the academy's representative say... "The music party is a showcase of the energy and creativity of Paperfold University." But the students don't care about this. They only want the event to be interesting.

t_ch: 所以盛会巨星不用有压力，按自己的想法尽情去演出就好啦！
t_en: So please don't be pressured, Festive Superstar! Just go with your gut and play your hearts out!

t_ch: 大概明白了。
t_en: I've just about got everything.

t_ch: 关于中央舞台…
t_en: About the central stage...

t_ch: 看到头顶那只金光灿灿的大鸟了吗？是不是特别地潮？！
t_en: Can you see that huge glittering golden bird above us? Isn't it super stylish?

t_ch: 这是筑梦学院特意为这次音乐派对设计的形象，既时髦又炫酷，还很符合舞台表演的主题，布设好后，很快就成为了整个校园的焦点。
t_en: This design is specifically created for this music party by Dreamweaver Academy. It's both trendy and cool, befitting the theme of the performance. Once it's set up, it'll become the highlight of the entire school.

t_ch: 据说它是下期《逐梦客时讯》的封面，好多学生都想爬上去和大鸟合影呢。
t_en: I hear that it'll be on the cover page of the next issue of Dreamchaser Bulletin. Many students want to climb up and take a selfie with the bird!

t_ch: 没什么事情了。
t_en: That's all.

t_ch: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
t_en: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

t_ch: 没什么事情了。
t_en: That's all.

t_ch: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
t_en: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！乐队演出真是太精彩了，我们就在台下给他们应援吧！
t_en: — Festive Superstar! The band performance was so exciting. Let's get off-stage and support them!

t_ch: 准备乐队演出。
t_en: Prepare for the band performance.

t_ch: 这也太拼了吧！行，我来帮你看看现在的进度。
t_en: So gung ho! Alright, let me help you check on the progress.

t_ch: 为乐队成员应援。
t_en: Provide support for the band members.

t_ch: 喔！「缭乱」！「缭乱」！我喜欢你们的演出！盛会巨星也来和我一起欢呼吧！
t_en: Wahoo! Dazzling! Dazzling! I love your performance! Come cheer with me, Festive Superstar!

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！乱破大人还没有回来，我先把舞台这边的情况稳住！
t_en: — Festive Superstar! Rappa is not back yet. Let me handle the situation on stage first!

t_ch: 准备乐队演出。
t_en: Prepare for the band performance.

t_ch: 行，我来帮你看看现在的进度。
t_en: Sure, let me help you look at the progress.

t_ch: 为乐队成员应援。
t_en: Provide support for the band members.

t_ch: 嗯，我相信乱破大人绝对会按时归来的！这可是忍者的承诺！
t_en: Yes, I believe Rappa will definitely return in time! This is the promise of a ninja!

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！音乐派对还没有结束哦，特意到舞台旁边来，是有什么事吗？
t_en: Festive Superstar! The music party hasn't ended yet. Is there something you need since you specifically came by the stage?

t_ch: 准备乐队演出。
t_en: Prepare for the band performance.

t_ch: 明白。即使乱破大人离开了，「缭乱」的音乐也不会停止！
t_en: Got it. Even with Lady Rappa's departure, the Dazzling's music will never stop playing!

t_ch: 可以和你聊聊吗？
t_en: Can we have a chat?

t_ch: 好呀。布置舞台也挺无聊的，不如来说说话，盛会巨星同学想要知道些什么呢？
t_en: Sure. Decorating the stage is kinda boring, but then again, as the Festive Superstar, is there anything you would like to know?

t_ch: 关于新的乐曲…
t_en: About the new tune...

t_ch: 对啦！我在检查舞台设备的时候，发现里面还存有一首未完成的曲子。
t_en: Oh right! When I was checking on the stage equipment, I noticed there was an unfinished track inside.

t_ch: 可能是乱破大人留下来的？具体我也不太清楚…但要是盛会巨星同学收集到足够的作曲灵感，其余乐队成员或许能完成这首曲子哦。
t_en: Maybe Lady Rappa left it behind? I'm not too sure either... but if you can collect enough composition inspiration, the remaining band members might be able to finish the track.

t_ch: 去试试吧！舞台演出还在继续，要是能有新的音乐当然更好啦！
t_en: Give it a try! The stage show is going to continue, so it'd be a bigger blast with new music!

t_ch: 关于乐队的评价…
t_en: The band's reviews...

t_ch: 最后那场闭幕演出，绝对是我见过的最精彩的舞台表演——没有之一！
t_en: That closing show at the end was deffo the most exciting performance I've ever witnessed, bar none!

t_ch: 乱破大人的惊喜登场，各位乐队成员的即兴演奏，还有盛会巨星和学院代表的对峙…现在可都是学校里的热门话题，相当有人气！
t_en: Lady Rappa's surprise reveal, everyone else's freestyling, and the showdown between the Festive Superstar and the academy's representative... It's spread across the school like wildfire, and everyone on campus can't stop talking about it!

t_ch: 哎，看过那么厉害的演出，我现在逛校庆都只会感觉到无聊了。
t_en: *sigh* After witnessing such a powerful performance, the other celebration activities appear bland in comparison.

t_ch: 关于音乐派对…
t_en: About the music party...

t_ch: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
t_en: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

t_ch: 你有事情要找我吗？
t_en: Do you need me for something?

t_ch: 啊，正好！就是…学校出了个年鉴，里面有个类似同学录的页面，每个人都可以给其他同学留言。我想请盛会巨星帮我简单写几句！
t_en: Ah, just in time! Umm... The school's come out with a yearbook, and it's got a page that's kinda like a message wall for everyone to leave notes. I'd like to ask you to write something in it for me, Festive Superstar!

t_ch: 怎么我没有收到消息？
t_en: Why didn't I receive this news?

t_ch: 可能是因为年鉴还在征集内容的阶段吧，你是盛会巨星，估计要等学校这边全都制作好了才会发到你手里，现在还早着呢。
t_en: Maybe because the yearbook's still in the content collection phase. You're the Festive Superstar, so you'll probably only get the final version after the school's curated it. It's still early days.

t_ch: 行啊，你想要什么风格的？
t_en: Sure, what kind of tone do you want it in?

t_ch: 都行！只要是盛会巨星同学写的，对我来说都是荣幸！
t_en: Anything's good! Anything written by you is an honor for me!

t_ch: 拜托了，帮个忙吧，乐队的其余同学都写了，就差你啦——
t_en: Please help me out. The other band members have also filled it up. It's just you left...

t_ch: （写下严肃的寄语）
t_en: (Write a serious message)

t_ch: （写下幽默的寄语）
t_en: (Write a witty message)

t_ch: （写下煽情的寄语）
t_en: (Write an emotional message)

t_ch: 辛苦！我这就上传…好啦，也发一份给你吧？嘿嘿，大家都会羡慕我的。
t_en: Thank you! I'll just upload it... Okay, and I send it to you too? Heh-heh, I'll be the envy of everyone.

t_ch: 没什么事情了。
t_en: That's all.

t_ch: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
t_en: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

t_ch: 音乐是世界的宝物啾！
t_en: Music is the world's treasure, tweet!

t_ch: 来，跟着我认真唱啾！
t_en: Come on, sing along with soul, tweet!

t_ch: 我们是折纸大学的不莱鸟乐队，为伟大的猫头鹰老师献唱，不懂音乐的家伙没资格和我们聊天啾！
t_en: We are Paperfold University's band, The Chirples! We offer our music to the great Professor Owl. Those who're deaf to music have no right to be talking to us, tweet!

t_ch: 啾？刚才是不是你在舞台旁边晃悠，原来是同行，你在乐队里担任哪个位置啾？
t_en: Tweet? Aren't you the one loitering about the stage just now? Didn't know you were one of us. What role are you in your band, tweet?

t_ch: 我是吉他手。
t_en: I'm the guitarist.

t_ch: 啾！流行的乐队动画里主角都是吉他手，这样对其余成员很不公平啾！
t_en: Tweet! The protags in popular band manga are all guitarists. That's unfair to the rest of the band, tweet!

t_ch: 我是贝斯手。
t_en: I'm the bassist.

t_ch: 啾！最讨厌那些连贝斯和吉他都分不清的粉丝，贝斯手也要有存在感啾！
t_en: Tweet! I hate it when fans can't even tell the difference between bass and guitar! Bassists exist too, tweet!

t_ch: 我是键盘手。
t_en: I'm the keyboardist.

t_ch: 啾！很多键盘手还要负责作曲工作，超辛苦的，大家都要好好对待键盘手啾！
t_en: Tweet! Many keyboardists also compose songs. It's super tiring! Everyone should treat keyboardists better, tweet!

t_ch: 我是鼓手。
t_en: I'm the drummer.

t_ch: 啾！鼓手在合影时候手里只能拿着鼓槌，很可怜的啾！
t_en: Tweet! Drummers can only hold on to their sticks in group photos, poor things, tweet!

t_ch: 我是乐队经理。
t_en: I'm the band manager.

t_ch: 啾！原来是制作人，忙着给乐队准备演奏曲目和场地，你也很不容易啾！
t_en: Tweet! So you're the producer then, scurrying about preparing tracks and venues for the band. Your job's tough too, tweet!

t_ch: 既然是热爱音乐的同好，那就来和我们合奏，看看实力啾！
t_en: Since we're all mutual music enthusiasts, come play with us! Let's see what you got, tweet!

t_ch: 乐队正在演奏美梦小镇的庆典进行曲——好梦来啾，要努力跟上我们的节奏啾！
t_en: The band's playing the Dreamville's marching song — Good Dreams Come, tweet! Do your best to keep up with us, tweet!

t_ch: （加入折纸小鸟的合奏）
t_en: (Join the Origami Birds' ensemble)

t_ch: 啾！啾啾！你在与折纸小鸟的合奏训练中取得了非常优秀的好成绩，恭喜你啾！
t_en: Tweet! Tweet tweet! You scored really high in the origami birds' ensemble training! Congrats, tweet!

t_ch: 实在是太厉害了！
t_en: That was awesome!

t_ch: 我得到了折纸小鸟的认可了！
t_en: I was acknowledged by the origami birds!

t_ch: 美梦小镇进行曲还有更困难的演出方式，欢迎随时来和我们合奏啾！
t_en: The Dreamville's marching song has even harder performance methods. You're welcome to play with us again, tweet!

t_ch: 音乐是世界的宝物，要用音乐让整个世界都变得热闹起来啾！
t_en: Music is the world's treasure. We must use music to turn the world into one huge concert, tweet!

t_ch: （收集到了折纸小鸟的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
t_en: (I collected the origami birds' rhythm record. Better send it to Rappa for a listen.)

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！我提供的情报没错吧！有遇见什么好玩的事情嘛？
t_en: ...Festive superstar! The info I got you was right on the money, wasn't it? Did you encounter anything fun?

t_ch: 遇到了很奇怪的事。
t_en: I ran into a strange incident.

t_ch: 其实……
t_en: Actually...

t_ch: 你将刚才见到的奇妙景象详细描述给了这位好奇的学生，还不忘添油加醋地宣称，自己发现了校园的第八大不可思议。
t_en: You vividly describe the wondrous scene you saw to this curious student, not forgetting to add your own spin on things, declaring that you discovered the eighth wonder on campus.

t_ch: 遇到了很厉害的事。
t_en: I encountered something amazing.

t_ch: 哼哼。
t_en: Heh-heh.

t_ch: 你将刚才见到的奇妙景象详细描述给了这位好奇的学生，还不忘添油加醋地宣称，折纸小鸟在学鸟叫大赛中仅仅获得了第二名。
t_en: You vividly describe the wondrous scene you saw to this curious student, not forgetting to add your own spin on things, declaring that the origami birds only came in second in the bird-calling contest.

t_ch: 哇！真的很好玩！既然能帮上忙，那我就拜托群友继续收集信息啦！
t_en: Woah! That sounded really fun! Since that helped, I'll continue asking my group to keep collecting info!

t_ch: 辛苦了。
t_en: I'm counting on you.

t_ch: 我正式封你为秘书•忍者！
t_en: I hereby dub you Secretary Ninja!

t_ch: 嘿嘿嘿，现在我也是忍者了。咳——在下必定完成任务，不辱使命！
t_en: Heehee, now I'm a ninja too. Ahem... I will surely complete the mission without fail!

t_ch: 关于<color=#dbc291ff>舞台的使用方式</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>灵感收集</color>方面有什么问题，可以随时来问我哦。
t_en: If you have any questions on <color=#dbc291ff>how to use the stage</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>inspiration collection</color>, don't hesitate to ask.

t_ch: ——让我和盛会巨星的乐队一起，尽情享受这场音乐派对吧！
t_en: ...Let me fully enjoy this music party with the festive superstar's band!

t_ch: 咕咕——新来的同学，不要在走廊里乱跑，注意安全咕。
t_en: Hoot hoot. New student, you should be careful and not run in the hallway, hoot.

t_ch: 新品种的折纸小鸟？
t_en: A new kind of origami bird?

t_ch: 咕咕咕，老鸟是「猫头鹰老师」，是钟表小子的好朋友——看看这片折纸树林里的小鸟们，它们都是我的学生。
t_en: Hoot hoothoot, I am Professor Owl, a good friend of Clockie's. See the birds in Paperfold Woods? They're all my students.

t_ch: 我有急事。
t_en: I'm in a hurry.

t_ch: 咕咕，你还年轻，时间多的是，凡事都能慢慢解决。
t_en: Hoot hoot. You're still young, with plenty of time. Everything should be resolved slowly.

t_ch: 哪怕是石头老板来了，都不用着急咕。
t_en: Even if Boss Stone were here, there's no need to rush, hoot.

t_ch: 对不起。
t_en: Sorry.

t_ch: 咕咕，没事没事——真是个懂礼貌的学生咕。
t_en: Hoot hoot, it's all right. What a polite student, hoot.

t_ch: 咕咕，我知道你在急什么，是为了咱们折纸树林里的「啾啾晚会」吧？老鸟听说你在这次晚会中承担很重要的职责，真了不起。
t_en: Hoot hoot. I know why you're in a hurry: It's for our Paperfold Woods' Chirpy Banquet, isn't it? This old bird has heard that you have an important duty to perform this night. How admirable.

t_ch: 对了，有几只跟我学习的折纸小鸟在前面的小屋子里排练呢，如果你有空就去帮帮他们吧。
t_en: Oh yes, some origami birds that I teach are practicing in the hut up ahead. Please help them out if you have time.

t_ch: 咕咕，晚会可是美梦小镇的一件大事，老鸟很期待这次的演出，你可要加油咕。
t_en: Hoot hoot. The banquet is a major event in the Dreamville. I look forward to your performance. Do your best, hoot.

t_ch: 汪呜？
t_en: Woof?

t_ch: 汪汪汪…汪汪！
t_en: Woof woof... woof woof!

t_ch: 佩佩用好奇的眼神望着你，仿佛想问为何你会突然到访。
t_en: Peppy gazes at you with curious eyes, as if asking why you are suddenly visiting.

t_ch: 其实，我也不明白。
t_en: Actually, I don't understand either.

t_ch: 其实，有件事想问…
t_en: Actually, I have something to ask...

t_ch: 就是…佩佩，你会演奏音乐吗？正经的旋律，不是有节奏地叫这种。
t_en: So... Peppy, can you play music? Proper melodies, not just rhythmic howling.
...Woof?

t_ch: 汪！汪汪…汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof woof... Woof woof woof!

t_ch: 好吧，你很清楚自己不该，至少不能对一只小狗的音乐天赋抱有期待。那么，在这个离地面无比遥远的空间站中，究竟该去哪寻找所谓的灵感呢？
t_en: Okay, you're acutely aware that you can't, or at least, shouldn't expect a dog to have any sort of musical talent. Then, where in this space station, far away from any landfall, can you find this supposed inspiration?

t_ch: ——{NICKNAME}？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 你来得正好！最近空间站发生了不少怪事，我正愁找不到人商量呢。
t_en: You've come at the right time! Plenty of strange things have been happening in the space station recently. I was just dying to talk to someone about it.

t_ch: 虽然在网上发了求助帖，但都没得到什么有用的信息。唉，这个站长是越来越难当了。
t_en: Though I posted threads on the internet asking for help, none of the comments were remotely useful. Bah, this lead researcher gig is getting harder each day.

t_ch: 先给你讲讲究竟发生了什么事吧。从前段时间开始，我发现空间站的科员们经常围坐在一起，窃窃私语，不知道在讨论什么。只要我靠近，他们马上就安静了。
t_en: I'll tell you what exactly happened first. It started some time ago — I noticed the station researchers would usually gather around and whisper to one another, but I don't know what they are discussing. As soon as I get close, they shut their gabs right away.

t_ch: 然后呢，那群科员上班都没什么精神，黑眼圈很重，好像晚上完全没睡觉似的。
t_en: And then, those researchers are all listless when they're at work, with heavy dark circles, like they hadn't slept all night.

t_ch: 玩手机玩的。
t_en: They were on their phones all night.

t_ch: 我每天都这样。
t_en: I'm like that every day.

t_ch: 这还不是最吓人的！夜晚的空间站走廊，经常能听到铛…铛…铛…铛的声音，就好像有人在用金属敲舱门，偶尔还会有人的惨叫声！
t_en: This isn't even the scariest thing! At night, along the space station's hallways, you can frequently hear a ding... ding... ding... sound, like someone's rapping on cabin hatches with metal. Sometimes you can hear screaming!

t_ch: 你说，该不会是有什么太空生物偷偷混进来了吧？
t_en: You don't suppose some space creature managed to break in, do you?

t_ch: 确实有点瘆人…
t_en: That sounds pretty creepy...

t_ch: 是吧！后来我去问那些科员，他们都不愿意告诉我，遮遮掩掩的，肯定有秘密！
t_en: I know, right? Later on, when I asked those researchers, they wouldn't tell me anything. All that secrecy, they must definitely be hiding something!

t_ch: 会不会是幻觉？
t_en: Could you have been hearing things?

t_ch: 不可能吧。我问过那些科员，但他们都表示不知情，遮遮掩掩的，像是有秘密。
t_en: Impossible. I asked those researchers, but they all feigned ignorance. All that secrecy, they must definitely be hiding something.

t_ch: 啊，不会是…大家都被邪恶的怪物偷偷替换掉了，整个空间站只剩我一个活人了吧？！
t_en: Ah, could it be... everyone was replaced by some evil monster, and I'm the only one alive in this whole space station!?

t_ch: 去问问黑塔怎么样？
t_en: How about asking Herta?

t_ch: 黑塔女士最近在忙很重要的测试，不会管这种小事的。
t_en: Madam Herta's been busy with some important tests recently. She wouldn't bother with such trivialities.

t_ch: 去问问阿兰怎么样？
t_en: How about asking Arlan?

t_ch: 唉，阿兰就是所有人中举止最可疑的那个，没有实际证据，我也不好当面去问。
t_en: *sigh* Arlan's the most suspicious of the lot. I can't ask about it either without solid proof.

t_ch: 去问问佩佩怎么样？
t_en: How about asking Peppy?

t_ch: 咦，这倒是个好办法！佩佩在空间站的行踪很自由，谁都不会提防它。
t_en: Huh, that does sound like a good idea! Peppy's free to roam about in the space station, and no one would suspect it.

t_ch: 不是，你来真的啊？
t_en: Wait, you were serious?

t_ch: 我就是随口说说的…
t_en: I was just spitballing...

t_ch: 还记得你以前用过的特殊联觉信标吗，最近科员们对它做了些改造，并安装到了空间站的小机器人身上。我们可以用它来和佩佩交流！
t_en: Do you still remember that special Synesthesia Beacon you used before? The researchers recently made some modifications to it and installed it on the little robot in the station. We can use it to talk to Peppy!

t_ch: 稍等，我这就去把小机器人喊来。
t_en: Hold on, I'll get the little robot here.

t_ch: 汪？
t_en: Woof?

t_ch: 嘶嘶，你好。嘶嘶——
t_en: Zzztzzt, hello. Zztzzt...

t_ch: 嘤嘤嘤。
t_en: Beepbeepbeep.

t_ch: 这真的能成功吗？
t_en: Will this really work?

t_ch: 先试试吧，我挺想知道佩佩说起话来是什么样的，是那种可爱的类型呢，还是超凶？
t_en: We have to give it a shot. I'm pretty curious what Peppy's voice sounds like — will it be adorable, or really gruff?

t_ch: 我来负责记录内容，等会就麻烦你实际操作小机器人了。
t_en: I'll be recording the content, so I'll trouble you to control the little robot.

t_ch: 都准备好了吗，我要启动翻译功能了哦。
t_en: Are you ready? I'm running the interpretation program.

t_ch: 汪！汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof woof woof!

t_ch: 我没有问题。嘶嘶。
t_en: I have no problems. Zztzzt.

t_ch: 嘤嘤嘤！
t_en: *sob in tears*

t_ch: ——拜托了，炒冷饭机器人！
t_en: ...Please, Fried Cold Rice Robot!

t_ch: 嘶嘶！
t_en: Zzzttzzzt!

t_ch: 需要再次进行翻译吗？嘶嘶。
t_en: Do you need another interpretation? Zzztzzt.

t_ch: （请机器人翻译）
t_en: (Get the robot to interpret)

t_ch: 铛…铛…铛…铛……
t_en: Ding... Ding... Ding... Ding...

t_ch: 佩佩提到了相同的声音，也就是说，这条线索很重要，和事情的真相有关。
t_en: Peppy mentions a similar sound, which also means that this clue is highly crucial — it could be related to the truth.

t_ch: …到底是什么意思呢？
t_en: ...What exactly does that mean?

t_ch: 汪！汪汪…汪汪汪汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof woof... Woof woof woof woof!

t_ch: 嘶嘶。我去，把他带来。
t_en: Zztzzt. I will, bring him here.

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 好久不见，我的朋友。你和站长找我过来，难道是我们的非人生物权益保护事业取得了重大进展，终于要在整个空间站推广开了吗？
t_en: Been a while, my friend. Seeing that you and the lead researcher invited me here, does that mean that our non-human rights protection initiative has seen progress? Are we finally going to promote this across the whole space station?

t_ch: 太感动了！我要代表世界上所有遭受压迫的非人生物向你表示谢意！
t_en: I'm so touched! I sincerely thank you on behalf of all non-human organisms who suffer persecution!

t_ch: 你提交的那些奇怪提案有空再说吧。有件事想要确认，就是——你知道什么是「铛…铛…铛…铛」吗？像这样，铛…铛…铛，非常有节奏的声音。
t_en: We'll talk about those strange requests that you submitted another time. There's something I need to confirm, which is... Do you know what "ding... ding... ding... ding" is? Just like that, ding... ding... ding, it's got a rhythm.

t_ch: 当然知道啊。噢？莫非…站长也沉迷打铁了？
t_en: Of course. Oh? Have... you've also gotten into perfect timing?

t_ch: …打铁？
t_en: ...Perfect timing?

t_ch: 啊…呃，是的！我最近刚开始打…可有意思了！
t_en: Ah... Err, yes! I've only recently gotten into it... It's super interesting!

t_ch: 对对！我们很感兴趣。
t_en: Yeah! We're really interested in that.

t_ch: 早说嘛，等会就把你们拉进游戏群！大家现在每个晚上都在打铁，有什么经验或者有用的攻略也会在群里交流，对你们这样的新人最有用了！
t_en: You should've said so! I'll pull you guys into a game group later on! Everyone's been working on their timing every night now. They share their experiences and strategies in the chat as well. These guides are just what newbies like you need to get started!

t_ch: 不知道那个策划脑子怎么想的，明明是个音乐游戏，非得做这么难，还设置了一堆恶意满满的陷阱，害得我们连觉都睡不好，天天熬夜想着怎么通关。
t_en: I've really got to hand it to the designer who came up with this. It's a rhythm game, but they had to make it so difficult. They even added a whole heap of nasty traps in it, forcing us to stay up all night wracking our brains to clear the levels.

t_ch: 原来…最近科员们是在沉迷游戏啊。所以才会白天没精神，夜晚发出奇怪的声响。
t_en: I see... Those researchers have been obsessed with a game lately. Which explains their listlessness in the day, and those weird sounds at night.

t_ch: 怪不得…上班摸鱼这种事，当然要瞒着我了。
t_en: Of course... they'd need to go behind my back to goof off at work.

t_ch: 也不知道这个出云忍者题材的游戏，是怎么突然流行起来的，回过神来的时候，身边所有人都在谈论了。难是难了点，不过…真好玩啊！
t_en: I also don't know how this Izumo ninja-themed game got so popular all of a sudden. Before I knew it, everyone around me was talking about it. It's pretty hard, but... it's really fun!

t_ch: 汪！汪！汪！汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof! Woof! Woof!

t_ch: 铛…铛…铛…铛！哈哈！
t_en: Ding... Ding... Ding... Ding! Haha!

t_ch: 别看佩佩不会说话，在旁边看我们玩游戏的时候可来劲了，意外地是个节奏高手啊！
t_en: Don't scoff at Peppy's inability to talk. It gets really intense when it's by our side watching us play. An unexpected expert in rhythm games!

t_ch: 汪！汪汪！
t_en: Woof! Woof woof!

t_ch: 总感觉要是放任佩佩继续和他们呆在一起，迟早有天会学坏。
t_en: I can't help but feel that if I allow Peppy to hang out with them any longer, it'll eventually get led down some bad vices.

t_ch: 不过，弄清楚了空间站正在发生的怪事，终于能放心了。辛苦你陪我调查啦。
t_en: But I can finally be at ease, now that I know what's going on in the space station. Thank you for investigating with me.

t_ch: （邀请艾丝妲来观看演出）
t_en: (Invite Asta to watch the performance)

t_ch: 咦，你在运营乐队？好有意思！
t_en: Huh? You're running a band? Interesting!

t_ch: 行呀，空间站正好需要点能让大家都嗨起来的活动。就算没法去现场，我也会收看你们的直播的！
t_en: Sure, the station needs some explosive event to get everyone hyped anyway. Even if we can't be there in person, I'll still tune in to your live stream!

t_ch: （收集到了佩佩的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
t_en: (Collected Peppy's rhythm record. Should send it to Rappa for a listen.)

t_ch: （咦，收到了新的消息。这次是…艾尔菲发来的？）
t_en: (Huh? Got a new message. It's... from Arfey this time?)

t_ch: （越来越好奇了…乱破所谓的音忍特训到底是什么样的啊？）
t_en: (More and more curious... What exactly is this special sound ninja training that Rappa's conducting?)

t_ch: （等收集完了灵感，就回排练室看看吧。）
t_en: (I'll head back to the rehearsal room for a gander when I'm done collecting inspiration.)

t_ch: 哟！稀客啊。让我瞧瞧…嗯，有段时间不见，你好像变得更摇滚了！
t_en: Yo! A rare visitor. Let's take a look... Mm, we haven't seen each other for some time. You look more rock 'n' roll now!

t_ch: 加把劲，你的摇滚程度快比得上机械屋的废弃引擎了。
t_en: Keep it up. Your rock 'n' roll vibe can almost rival the discarded engines of the workshop.

t_ch: 摇滚还能看出来的吗？
t_en: You can even tell when something's rock 'n' roll?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，那是当然！玩乐队的人身上都有股独特的气息，我一眼就能看出来。
t_en: Hahaha, of course! There's a unique aura on people who play in a band. I can tell in a glance.

t_ch: 虽然没希露瓦说得那么夸张，但我也看得出来，大概就是说话时候的神态、语调，平时的着装…还有奇怪的手势。
t_en: While it's not as exaggerated as Serval suggests, I can see it too. It's something about stance and inflection when you speak, and your everyday attire... and that strange gesture.

t_ch: 这是什么奇妙的比喻？
t_en: What sort of wonderful metaphor is that?

t_ch: 别太在意，这是希露瓦最近喜欢讲的冷笑话。她偶然在雪地里找到了一架坏掉的机兵，动轮摩擦履带的声音就像是在演奏吉他，还挺好听的。
t_en: Don't mind it. It's just a dad joke that Serval enjoys telling lately. She found a broken automaton in the snow — the noise it makes when its wheels are rubbing against the track sounds like a guitar playing, and pretty good too, I might add.

t_ch: 后来，她想出了用机械设备来形容别人的笑话…完全不好笑。
t_en: Later, she thought of a joke that uses machines to describe other people... It's not funny at all.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，谁叫那个坏掉的机兵，吉他弹得比我还好呢？大自然还真是神奇啊。
t_en: Hahaha, who knew that broken automation can play the guitar better than I do? Nature is truly wondrous.

t_ch: 所以，你是真的在从事音乐相关的工作吗？
t_en: So, are you really doing music-related work?

t_ch: 你向两位资深乐队成员讲述了在折纸大学的故事，还不忘反复强调经理的工作有多辛苦。
t_en: You elaborate on the incident at Paperfold University to the two seasoned musicians, and even make the effort to repeatedly emphasize the hardships of managerial work.

t_ch: 明白，不就是写不出歌嘛，这事我们可有经验了。演出临近，要演奏的曲子却还没有着落，是挺烦躁的。不过别急，总归会有办法。
t_en: Understood. It's just writer's block, isn't it? Not something new to us. When a show is looming, but the song that needs to be performed isn't finalized, it's pretty annoying. But don't rush it. There's always a way.

t_ch: 如果通宵作曲也算的话…唉，想起那段没日没夜为公演做准备的时间，我还心有余悸。
t_en: If you count staying up all night to write the song... *sigh* My trauma still lingers from the sheer thought of those endless days and nights preparing for a show.

t_ch: 但很开心啊！「机械热潮」就是要让这座城市燥起来——我们当然也包括在内！
t_en: But they were fun! The Mechanical fever is all about dialing this city up to eleven, and it's got to include us, obviously!

t_ch: 想要寻找灵感的话，我建议你可以在广场附近转转。贝洛伯格虽然不像大城市那样繁华，但我们上百年音乐底蕴可不会输给他们。
t_en: If you seek inspiration, I suggest you go walk around the plaza. Belobog may not be as prosperous as those big cities, but we won't lose out with our centuries of musical heritage.

t_ch: 啊，说到这个，我想起来了。前段时间从车站经过的时候，好像听到有演出的声音…水平不好说，但风格…很有特色！
t_en: Ah, speaking of which, that reminds me. When I was passing by the station a while back, I thought I could hear sounds of a performance... It wasn't all that great, but its style... was unique!

t_ch: 或许是某个外来的地下乐队吧，你可以去看看。
t_en: It could've been a foreign underground band. You can go take a look.

t_ch: （邀请她们来观看演出）
t_en: (Invite them to watch the performance)

t_ch: …是因为没人看演出，打算把票卖给熟人嘛？
t_en: ...Is it because no one wants to see it, that you're selling the tickets to your friends?

t_ch: 这种心情我也能理解啦。新组建的乐队，名气小，原创曲也少，刚开始都很艰难的。
t_en: I understand where you're coming from. A newly formed band with little fame and few original songs — starting from scratch is always hard.

t_ch: 没关系，我们也是这么过来的。你还剩多少票，我帮你在贝洛伯格也宣传下~
t_en: It's okay. We all started from somewhere. How many tickets do you have left? I'll help you promote your show in Belobog!

t_ch: 是免费的，免费！
t_en: They're free! Free!

t_ch: 不是卖，是赠送！
t_en: I'm not selling them. I'm giving them to you!

t_ch: 对不起，最近有不少公务要处理，可能没法去匹诺康尼…但我和希露瓦会支持你的。
t_en: Sorry, I have a lot of official business to handle lately, so I might not make it to Penacony... But Serval and I will be supporting you.

t_ch: 加油！带着我们的摇滚精神一起演奏吧！
t_en: Go for it! Carry our rocker spirit along with you for the show of a lifetime!

t_ch: （贝洛伯格的地下乐队…希望能从他们的演出中得到些灵感吧。）
t_en: (Belobog's underground band... I hope I can get some inspiration from their performances.)

t_ch: 就是…你好，请问你会演奏音乐吗？
t_en: Err... Hello, do you know how to play music?

t_ch: ——不对吧！！！我为什么在和垃圾桶讲话啊？！
t_en: ...C'mon!!! Why am I talking to a trashcan!?

t_ch: 你来到希露瓦指示的地点，却没有见到任何与乐队有关的内容。最显眼的是摆在路旁的几个垃圾桶，它们的色泽光鲜，棱角分明。
t_en: You arrive at the location with Serval's directions, but don't see anything relevant to a band. The most conspicuous things are several trashcans lying by the roadside. Their luster is shiny, their angles crisp and clean.

t_ch: 好吧，谁说垃圾桶不算是一种重金属呢？
t_en: Okay, who can claim trashcans aren't a type of heavy metal?

t_ch: 来都来了。
t_en: You're already here anyway.

t_ch: 不如翻翻看吧！
t_en: Might as well give them a rummage!

t_ch: 既然如此…
t_en: If that's the case...

t_ch: 不如做点更摇滚的事吧！
t_en: Why not do something even more rock!

t_ch: 你朝周围环视了圈，确定没有人注意到这边。于是，在强烈冲动的驱使下，你向桶盖伸出了手……
t_en: You look all around you to make sure no one's paying attention. Then, driven by some primal instinct, you reach for the trashcan lid...

t_ch: 人类！偷垃圾乃是犯罪，品尝禁忌的滋味，给你一个机会，现在赶紧撤退！
t_en: Human, stealing trash is a crime! Tasting the forbidden... you've crossed the line. I'll give you a chance, better take your shot, right now, step back, or you'll get caught!

t_ch: 什么东西我说，算盘打得不错，可惜实在太弱，模样显得做作，不如重开再次来过。
t_en: What did I just hear? Your plan was pretty neat, but too bad you're weak, and your style's obsolete. You're looking way too fake, better hit restart, come back stronger, and play it smart!

t_ch: 出去，出去，我有学过法律，特别会用比喻，休想偷偷摸摸再继续！
t_en: Get out, get out, I've studied the law. I'm sharp with metaphors, gonna leave you in awe. Don't think you can sneak around, not anymore!

t_ch: 对不起，我走错了。
t_en: Sorry, I've got the wrong place.

t_ch: 呃…误闯此地，向各位致意，希望争端就此平息，好让我安心逃离。
t_en: Uh... stumbled in by mistake, I greet you all, hoping this beef can end, so I can make my call. Let me leave in peace, no more trouble at all.

t_ch: 垃圾桶组合，好酷！
t_en: A trashcan group, cool!

t_ch: 原来是同行，还好我没怯场，各位的表现确实很强，能否让我继续观赏？
t_en: Ah, you're from our profession. Good thing I didn't suffer from performance anxiety. All your performances were amazing. May I keep watching?

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Yeah.

t_ch: 嗯！
t_en: Sure!

t_ch: 大哥！这个家伙挺不错的诶！
t_en: Bro! This one's all right!

t_ch: 兄弟哟，莫要被诡计多端的人骗了！想加入我们？可以，但要先看看你的诚意。
t_en: My brothers, do not be blinded by cunning charlatans! You want to join us? Sure, but that depends on your sincerity.

t_ch: 跟上我的节奏，来场琥珀纪末的终极说唱大比拼吧——
t_en: Keep up with my flow. We're gonna have the ultimate rap showdown that marks the end of the Amber Era!!!

t_ch: （跟上垃圾桶的节奏…？）
t_en: (Keep up with the trashcan's beat...?)

t_ch: 来就来！
t_en: Here I come. I'm not scared!

t_ch: 诸位桶之先祖哟，敬请见证——
t_en: Yo, ancestors of the barrels, bear witness please—

t_ch: 我也曾望着话筒空余恨，下定决心要努力发愤。然而梦想不会轻易临门，还好我愿意痴痴地等。心好冷。
t_en: I used to stare at the mic, full of unease. Made up my mind to grind, chase my dreams with no release, but dreams ain't something you just seize with ease. I was willing to wait in belief, even when my heart was cold, felt the grief.

t_ch: 如今远大理想即将达成，终于有人听懂我的歌声，{F#她}{M#他}就像是指路明灯。
t_en: Now my big dreams are finally coming true, someone's vibing with my song, they get the tune. {F#She}{M#He}'s like a guiding light, shining through.

t_ch: 让寒冷的心不断升温！
t_en: Warming up this cold heart, make it anew!

t_ch: 呜呜，大哥…太好了，真的太好了……
t_en: Boohoo, Bro... That, that was amazing...

t_ch: 气氛怎么变得奇怪了？
t_en: Why's the atmosphere gone all weird?

t_ch: 在说我的事？
t_en: Talking about me?

t_ch: 你的热情与技巧都经受住了考验，你的决心和能力都是万中拔尖，你是当之无愧的——桶之说唱之巅。
t_en: Your passion and skill have stood the test, your resolve and talent outshine the rest. You are the one, true, undisputed — champ of the trashcan rap, no less.

t_ch: 桶友！我要发问——你愿意把剩余的人生交给我们吗？
t_en: Trashfriend! I'm gonna ask — are you willing to leave the rest of your life in our hands?

t_ch: 交给我们吧！
t_en: Leave it to us!

t_ch: 大哥，{F#她}{M#他}就是我们梦寐以求的新成员啊！
t_en: Boss, {F#she}{M#he} is the new member we've all been dreaming of!

t_ch: 这个……
t_en: Well...

t_ch: 我遵守垃圾分类制度。
t_en: I will adhere to the trash-sorting regulations.

t_ch: 对不起，但我和你们应该不是同类。
t_en: Sorry, but our music is probably not the same type.

t_ch: 但我有自己的乐队了。
t_en: But I already have a band of my own.

t_ch: 对不起，我还没做好和你们共同登台的觉悟。
t_en: Sorry, I'm not ready to share the stage with you guys.

t_ch: 嗯。既然如此，我也不强求。那么，以后我们就是竞争对手了。
t_en: Mm. If that's the case, I won't insist. That means we'll be rivals when we next meet.

t_ch: 不是我们的对手！
t_en: No match for us!

t_ch: 大哥！下次的演出，就让这些家伙来给我们暖场好了！
t_en: Bro! Let's just get these guys to open for us for the next show!

t_ch: 回去吧，你的使命不在这里。但要记好了——音乐，是没有差别的！
t_en: Go back. Your destiny doesn't belong here. But remember — there are no differences in all music!

t_ch: （收集到了垃圾桶的节奏记录，发给乱破听听吧。）
t_en: (Collected the trashcans' rhythm record. Let's send this to Rappa for a listen.)

t_en: (Huh, a new message. This time it's... from Dafanchy?)

t_en: (What's Dafanchy trying to say... Did I say something wrong?)

t_ch: （等收集完了灵感，就回排练室看看吧。）
t_en: (I'll head back to the rehearsal room for a gander when I'm done collecting inspiration.)

t_ch: 主公，「{TEXTJOIN#120}」的音律•狩猎圆满达成目标，我等能取得此番大捷，主公功不可没。
t_en: Sound Master, {TEXTJOIN#120}'s Sound Hunt has been completed smoothly. Our success is all thanks to your great contributions, oh Sound Master.

t_ch: 后续还有两次作战，请主公与诸位音忍并肩前行，共同将本次祭典的氛围推至最高潮吧！
t_en: There will be two more battles from here. Please advance alongside the sound ninja and get this festival's atmosphere pumping to the max, Sound Master!

t_ch: 交给我吧！
t_en: Leave it to me!

t_ch: 辛苦大家！
t_en: Good work, everyone!

t_ch: 还有两次？累了。
t_en: Two more? I'm exhausted.

t_ch: 莫要退却！忍者的修行要坚持不渝！
t_en: You must not back down! A ninja's training requires resolve!

t_ch: 话说其余三位音忍呢？他们在先前的音律•狩猎结束后便再未露面…难道是在准备庆功会？
t_en: Come to think of it, where are the other three sound ninjas? I haven't seen them since the end of the last Sound Hunt... Could they perhaps be preparing some kind of celebration?

t_ch: 唔…在下的忍•直觉感到有些不对劲，还是找找他们吧。
t_en: Hmm... My ninja intuition tells me that something is not right. Go and seek them out.

t_ch: 乐队正在演奏美梦小镇的庆典进行曲——好梦来啾，要努力跟上我们的节奏啾！
t_en: The band's playing the Dreamville's marching song — Good Dreams Come, tweet! Do your best to keep up with us, tweet!

t_ch: （加入折纸小鸟的合奏）
t_en: (Join the Origami Birds' ensemble)

t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_ch: 你好，嘶嘶——我来负责，翻译佩佩的说话内容。嘶嘶——准备好了吗？
t_en: Hi, beep! I am responsible for translating what Peppy is saying. Beep. Are you ready to try things out?

t_ch: ——拜托了，炒冷饭机器人！
t_en: ...Please, Fried Cold Rice Robot!

t_ch: 我还有别的事。
t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_ch: 展示你的诚意，跟上我的节奏，来场琥珀纪末的终极说唱大比拼吧——
t_en: Express your sincerity. Keep up with my flow. We're gonna have the ultimate rap showdown that marks the end of the Amber Era!!!

t_ch: 来就来！
t_en: Here I come. I'm not scared!

t_ch: 我还有别的事。
t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_ch: 舞台竞技，实力说话。想证明你很强，就在这场竞赛中堂堂正正击败我们吧！
t_en: Show what you got on the stage. If you want to prove you're stronger, defeat us fair and square in this competition!

t_ch: 快点吧，我很忙的。
t_en: Hurry up. I'm very busy.

t_ch: 我还有别的事。
t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_en: Boohoo... I want to express my love to Madam Ruan Mei too. Please help me, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}!

t_ch: 我来帮你！
t_en: Let me help you!

t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_en: The Trotter wiggles and waggles about, as if welcoming your presence. Now what? Take out your camera and play with it for a while?

t_ch: 帮它拍个纪念照吧。
t_en: Take a commemorative photo of it.

t_ch: 我还有别的事。
t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_ch: ——来吧！加入我们，用最大的音量，最华丽的表演，最自信的姿态，让整个世界都记住你的存在！
t_en: ...Come! Join us! Let the world remember your existence with the loudest volume, the most beautiful performance, and the most confident poise!

t_ch: 加入垃圾桶的示威。
t_en: Join the trashcans' demonstration.

t_ch: 我还有别的事。
t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_ch: 新游戏首次测试，只需体验三分钟，相信你就会像我一样，爱上这款游戏！
t_en: There's a new game doing their first playtest. Just three minutes and I'm sure you'll love this game just like I do!

t_ch: 给我玩玩吧。
t_en: Let me play it.

t_ch: 我还有别的事。
t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_en: It won't cost anything to playtest this new game. Immerse yourself in a perfect game experience at no cost. It's guaranteed high-octane, <unbreak>100%</unbreak> assured fun!

t_ch: 给我玩玩吧。
t_en: Let me play it.

t_en: I've got something else to do.

t_ch: （折纸小鸟…在排练？前面的小屋子是指教室吧…去看看好了。）
t_en: (Origami Birds... practicing? The room ahead must be the classroom... Better go take a look.)

t_ch: 你们觉得这个领队靠谱吗？
t_en: You sure this leader is reliable?

t_ch: 有趣的小姐。充满迷人的魅力，我从未见过如此特别的学生。
t_en: A very interested young lady filled with charm. I've never met such a special student.

t_ch: 她很自信的样子。应该没问题…吧？
t_en: She looks confident. There shouldn't be a problem... should there?

t_ch: 至少比我强……
t_en: At least she's better than me...

t_ch: 我就不该问你们。无论如何，距离首场演出没多少时间，先完成学院的任务再说吧。
t_en: I never should've asked you all. There's not much time left before the first show. We'll talk about this after finishing the school's task.

t_ch: 希望她在排练时候能稍微正经点。
t_en: I hope she'll be a little more serious during practice.

t_ch: 我想在这个人画的涂鸦前演奏！
t_en: I want to play a piece in front of this artist's graffiti!

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！就是…我听群友说，那些奇特的音乐现象最近又有了新的变化，可以去看看！说不定对你们会有帮助呢。
t_en: The Festive Superstar! There's... I heard some of my friends say that those special musical phenomena have undergone some recent changes. You can go and check them out! Maybe that might be helpful for you.

t_ch: 准备乐队演出。
t_en: Prepare for the band performance.

t_ch: 嗯，我来帮你全都整理好！
t_en: Yeah. I'll help you get everything organized!

t_ch: ——盛会巨星！实在是太厉害了！
t_en: Festive Superstar! That was awesome!

t_ch: 先前我在检查舞台设备的时候，发现里面还有一首没写完的曲子。然后呢，因为你收集到了更多的作曲灵感，我就拜托乐队的其余成员把这首乐曲完成啦！
t_en: First, when I was checking on the stage equipment, I noticed there was an unfinished track inside. After that, I asked the band and others to help finish this song with all the Inspiration you gathered!

t_ch: 随时都可以进行演奏哦，要来试试吗？
t_en: We can start a performance at any time. Wanna try?

t_ch: 我要开始走咯。
t_en: I'm about to take a step.

t_ch: 皮皮西人的一小步。
t_en: One small step for the Pepeshi people.

t_ch: 击垮你们的一大步！
t_en: One giant leap for my vision to crush you all!

t_ch: 不会吧，不会吧。
t_en: Come on, seriously?

t_ch: 你真相信她能赶回来？
t_en: Do you really think she'll make it back in time?

t_ch: 找到帮手了吗？
t_en: Have you found any help?

t_ch: 这情况，谁都救不了！
t_en: Nobody can possibly save the day!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，咱们还有没有什么没讲的笑话？
t_en: Hahaha, any jokes we missed?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，差不多都说过了吧？
t_en: Hahaha, that's pretty much all of them, isn't it?

t_ch: 「让我们来留下印记吧！！！！」——忍者•契波大人如是说
t_en: "Let's leave our mark!!!" As declared by Ninja Lord Czipo.

t_ch: 没体验过的全新版本！
t_en: A completely fresh version that offers a unique experience!

t_ch: 欢迎试玩，欢迎体验！
t_en: Feel free to give it a go!

t_ch: 全免费无内购的新作。
t_en: This new release is totally free with no sneaky in-app purchases.

t_ch: 欢迎试玩，欢迎体验。
t_en: Feel free to give it a go.

t_ch: 呜呜…我好悲伤喵。
t_en: Ohh... I'm feeling so sad, meow.

t_ch: 总算来了。
t_en: You're finally here.

t_ch: 哎呀，有点难说出口啊。
t_en: Ahh, I can't bring myself to say it.

t_ch: 诸位…难道是有什么话想对在下讲吗？
t_en: You... Is there something that you wish to tell me?

t_ch: 直接说吧。
t_en: Just say it.

t_ch: 大家为何支支吾吾？
t_en: Why are you all so hesitant?

t_ch: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，非常抱歉，我思考了很久，但觉得还是要告诉你这个决定。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} manager, I am so sorry. I thought about this for a long time, but I have to share this decision with you.

t_ch: 我…希望结束这个乐队。
t_en: I... I want to disband the band.

t_ch: 为什么？
t_en: Why?

t_ch: 这句话可不能随便说啊。
t_en: You can't just say that so casually.

t_ch: 好经典的剧情…
t_en: A classic storyline...

t_ch: 为何？我等先前的音律•狩猎不是很成功吗？
t_en: Why? Wasn't our last Sound Hunt a huge success?

t_ch: 经过上次演出，我确定乐队风格和我的追求相距甚远，并且没有任何改变的可能。
t_en: After our last performance, I realized that the band's style is way different to what I'm looking for, and there's no chance of that changing.

t_ch: 谐乐学院指派给我的任务是：作为乐队核心完成在音乐派对的演出。乱破同学明显不会退让，我也尽到了吉他手的职责，那么就没有留在这的必要了。
t_en: The mission that Charmony Academy gave me was to complete a performance at the music party as a band leader. I know that Rappa won't back down, and I have fulfilled my duty as a guitarist, so there is no need for me to stick around here.

t_ch: 吉他•忍徒，阁下当真如此在意忍首的位置？
t_en: Ninja Initiate Guitar, do you really truly covet the title of Head Ninja?

t_ch: 我从入学开始就期待着这场演出，许多闻名梦境的乐手都是在音乐派对上成名的。而无论是天赋还是技巧，我都是最适合乐队核心的学生。
t_en: I have looked forward to this performance since the moment I entered the academy. So many famous Dreamscape musicians made their name here, at the music party. When it comes to talent or skill, it's obvious that I am most suited to being a band leader.

t_ch: 现在你莫名其妙地跑出来，为我们的演出带来了风险，抢走了属于我的位置，难道还要责备我心胸狭隘吗？
t_en: But then you came running out of nowhere and put our performance in jeopardy. You stole my rightful role, and you are going to claim I'm narrow-minded?

t_ch: 嗯…在下明白了。看来阁下是一位「忍道」明晰的忍徒，认为在下的决断阻碍了阁下的忍道。
t_en: Hmm... I understand your predicament. I see you are a ninja with a clear tenet. You feel that my decisions are standing in the way of that path.

t_ch: 没错，你挡住我的路了，乱破同学。
t_en: That's right. You're blocking my path, Rappa.

t_ch: 但是在下必须说明——忍首需承担的绝非只有自己的忍道，还有其余忍徒的忍道。阁下的每句话都在强调自己的期望，又是否有将其余忍徒考虑在内……
t_en: But there is one thing I must make clear... A head ninja is not merely responsible for their own tenet, but for their fellow ninja initiates' tenets, too. Your every word has expressed your own hopes, but have you taken your fellow ninjas into consideration...?

t_ch: 够了！
t_en: Enough!

t_ch: 到现在还要说奇怪的话，那你就继续在这玩无聊的忍者扮演游戏吧！
t_en: You're still saying weird stuff like that even now? Then you can stay here and play your boring ninja game without me!

t_ch: 我没有时间，也没有兴趣陪你胡闹。经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，请谅解，但无论如何。
t_en: I don't have the time, nor the interest, to put up with your nonsense. {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, please forgive me, but I must do this...

t_ch: ——我申请退出乐队。
t_en: ...I submit my resignation to the band.

t_ch: 丢下这句话后，艾尔菲迅速离开了，甚至没带走属于她的那把吉他。
t_en: After finally getting these words out, Arfey leaves in a hurry, even forgetting to take her own guitar with her.
